requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / Performance — Azerbaijan National Energy Programmes vs EU Ecodesign
requirement_topic.zh: 能效 / 性能——阿塞拜疆国家能效计划 vs 欧盟生态设计
requirement_topic.zht: 能效 / 性能——亞塞拜然國家能效計劃 vs 歐盟生態設計

summary.en: Azerbaijan addresses lighting energy efficiency through national energy programmes and energy-efficiency policy rather than an EU-style binding Ecodesign minimum-performance regulation that bars market entry. As a result, there is generally no EU-equivalent hard market-entry floor on luminous efficacy （lm/W）, CRI, lifetime, or power factor enforced as a precondition of conformity; instead, energy-efficiency expectations are driven by procurement, national efficiency programmes, and any product requirements set under AZSTAND for regulated categories. Manufacturers should still expect to provide rated photometric and electrical data (efficacy, power, power factor, rated lifetime) for the technical file and for energy-programme or public-procurement participation. Confirm the current scope of any mandatory efficiency thresholds with AZSTAND / the relevant national energy authority before assuming none apply.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆通过国家能效计划及能效政策处理照明能效，而非以欧盟式具约束力、可阻止市场准入的生态设计最低性能法规处理。因此，一般不存在作为合格评定先决条件强制执行的、相当于欧盟的光效（lm/W）、显色指数、寿命或功率因数的硬性市场准入门槛；能效预期更多由采购、国家能效计划及 AZSTAND 为受管制类别设定的任何产品要求驱动。制造商仍应预期需为技术文件及能效计划或公共采购参与提供额定光度及电气数据（光效、功率、功率因数、额定寿命）。在假定无适用门槛前，请向 AZSTAND / 相关国家能效主管部门确认任何强制能效门槛的现行范围。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然通過國家能效計劃及能效政策處理照明能效，而非以歐盟式具約束力、可阻止市場准入的生態設計最低性能法規處理。因此，一般不存在作為合格評定先決條件強制執行的、相當於歐盟的光效（lm/W）、顯色指數、壽命或功率因數的硬性市場准入門檻；能效預期更多由採購、國家能效計劃及 AZSTAND 為受管制類別設定的任何產品要求驅動。製造商仍應預期需為技術文件及能效計劃或公共採購參與提供額定光度及電氣數據（光效、功率、功率因數、額定壽命）。在假定無適用門檻前，請向 AZSTAND / 相關國家能效主管部門確認任何強制能效門檻的現行範圍。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan national energy-efficiency programmes / energy policy (lighting efficiency promotion; confirm current instruments)
AZSTAND national conformity regime — any product efficiency requirements for regulated lighting categories

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which defines energy-efficiency grades (commonly Grade 1 ≥90 lm/W, Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W, Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for CN market entry) and is paired with mandatory China Energy Label (CEL) registration administered by SAMR. GB 30255 sets a binding minimum efficacy floor for in-scope products in China, unlike Azerbaijan's programme-driven approach.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定能效等级（通常 1 级 ≥90 lm/W、2 级 ≥80 lm/W、3 级 ≥70 lm/W，3 级为中国市场准入最低要求），并配套由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理的强制性中国能效标识（CEL）注册。与阿塞拜疆以计划驱动的做法不同，GB 30255 对中国范围内产品设定了约束性最低能效门槛。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定能效等級（通常 1 級 ≥90 lm/W、2 級 ≥80 lm/W、3 級 ≥70 lm/W，3 級為中國市場准入最低要求），並配套由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理的強制性中國能效標識（CEL）注冊。與亞塞拜然以計劃驅動的做法不同，GB 30255 對中國範圍內產品設定了約束性最低能效門檻。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: The structural difference is that China imposes a binding minimum efficacy floor (GB 30255 Grade 3, ≥70 lm/W) as a precondition of market entry, whereas Azerbaijan generally drives efficiency through national energy programmes and procurement rather than an EU-style hard Ecodesign floor — so a CN-compliant product is unlikely to face a stricter mandatory efficacy bar in Azerbaijan than it already meets at home. Practical implications: (1) there is generally no additional mandatory market-entry efficacy/CRI/lifetime/power-factor floor to clear for Azerbaijan beyond what AZSTAND prescribes for the category — but this must be confirmed, not assumed; (2) to win public procurement or qualify under national energy programmes, higher-efficacy product (CN Grade 1/2 level) is advantageous; (3) prepare rated photometric/electrical data for the technical file. Confirm the current scope of any AZSTAND-mandated efficiency requirement before treating efficiency as non-binding.
gap.zh: 结构性差异在于：中国以约束性最低能效门槛（GB 30255 3 级，≥70 lm/W）作为市场准入先决条件，而阿塞拜疆一般通过国家能效计划及采购而非欧盟式硬性生态设计门槛驱动能效——故符合中国标准的产品在阿塞拜疆不太可能面临比其本国已满足者更严格的强制能效门槛。实务影响：（1）除 AZSTAND 为该类别规定者外，阿塞拜疆一般无须额外通过强制市场准入能效/显色指数/寿命/功率因数门槛——但此须确认而非假定；（2）为赢得公共采购或符合国家能效计划，更高能效产品（中国 1/2 级水平）具优势；（3）为技术文件准备额定光度/电气数据。在将能效视为非约束性之前，请确认任何 AZSTAND 强制能效要求的现行范围。
gap.zht: 結構性差異在於：中國以約束性最低能效門檻（GB 30255 3 級，≥70 lm/W）作為市場准入先決條件，而亞塞拜然一般通過國家能效計劃及採購而非歐盟式硬性生態設計門檻驅動能效——故符合中國標準的產品在亞塞拜然不太可能面臨比其本國已滿足者更嚴格的強制能效門檻。實務影響：（1）除 AZSTAND 為該類別規定者外，亞塞拜然一般無須額外通過強制市場准入能效/顯色指數/壽命/功率因數門檻——但此須確認而非假定；（2）為贏得公共採購或符合國家能效計劃，更高能效產品（中國 1/2 級水平）具優勢；（3）為技術文件準備額定光度/電氣數據。在將能效視為非約束性之前，請確認任何 AZSTAND 強制能效要求的現行範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / programme-driven — energy efficiency addressed via national energy programmes and procurement; any binding efficiency floor depends on AZSTAND scope for the category (confirm current instruments) — no confirmed EU-style hard Ecodesign market-entry floor
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Azerbaijan addresses lighting energy efficiency through national energy programmes and procurement rather than a confirmed EU-style binding Ecodesign market-entry floor. A CN-compliant product (meeting GB 30255 Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W or better) is unlikely to face a stricter mandatory efficacy bar at the Azerbaijan border, but any AZSTAND-mandated efficiency requirement for the category must be confirmed, not assumed. Higher-efficacy product helps in public procurement and energy programmes. Prepare rated photometric/electrical data for the technical file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆通过国家能效计划及采购处理照明能效，而非已确认的欧盟式具约束力生态设计市场准入门槛。符合中国标准的产品（满足 GB 30255 3 级 ≥70 lm/W 或更优）在阿塞拜疆口岸不太可能面临更严格的强制能效门槛，但该类别任何 AZSTAND 强制能效要求须确认而非假定。更高能效产品有助于公共采购及能效计划。请为技术文件准备额定光度/电气数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜然通過國家能效計劃及採購處理照明能效，而非已確認的歐盟式具約束力生態設計市場准入門檻。符合中國標準的產品（滿足 GB 30255 3 級 ≥70 lm/W 或更優）在亞塞拜然口岸不太可能面臨更嚴格的強制能效門檻，但該類別任何 AZSTAND 強制能效要求須確認而非假定。更高能效產品有助於公共採購及能效計劃。請為技術文件準備額定光度/電氣數據。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Information / Labelling — Azerbaijan Programme vs EU Energy Label + EPREL
requirement_topic.zh: 能效信息 / 标签——阿塞拜疆计划 vs 欧盟能效标签 + EPREL
requirement_topic.zht: 能效信息 / 標籤——亞塞拜然計劃 vs 歐盟能效標籤 + EPREL

summary.en: Azerbaijan does not operate an EU-equivalent rescaled A-G energy label with a mandatory central product database (the EU EPREL system) for light sources. Energy information is handled through national energy-efficiency programmes and any applicable AZSTAND / consumer-information requirements rather than a compulsory pan-market A-G label and pre-market database registration. Where a national energy-efficiency labelling or information scheme applies to lighting, manufacturers (via the in-country importer) provide rated efficacy and electrical data; confirm the current national scheme, its label format if any, and whether registration is required. There is no EU EPREL-equivalent pre-market database registration confirmed for Azerbaijan — verify with the national energy authority before market placement.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆不实行相当于欧盟、针对光源的重新调整 A-G 能效标签及强制中央产品数据库（欧盟 EPREL 系统）。能效信息通过国家能效计划及任何适用的 AZSTAND / 消费者信息要求处理，而非强制性全市场 A-G 标签及上市前数据库注册。在国家能效标签或信息方案适用于照明时，制造商（经在地进口商）提供额定光效及电气数据；请确认现行国家方案、其标签版式（如有）及是否须注册。阿塞拜疆未确认存在相当于欧盟 EPREL 的上市前数据库注册——上市前请向国家能效主管部门核实。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然不實行相當於歐盟、針對光源的重新調整 A-G 能效標籤及強制中央產品數據庫（歐盟 EPREL 系統）。能效信息通過國家能效計劃及任何適用的 AZSTAND / 消費者信息要求處理，而非強制性全市場 A-G 標籤及上市前數據庫注冊。在國家能效標籤或信息方案適用於照明時，製造商（經在地進口商）提供額定光效及電氣數據；請確認現行國家方案、其標籤版式（如有）及是否須注冊。亞塞拜然未確認存在相當於歐盟 EPREL 的上市前數據庫注冊——上市前請向國家能效主管部門核實。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan national energy-efficiency labelling / information scheme for lighting (confirm current instrument and label format, if any)
AZSTAND national conformity regime — consumer information / energy-data requirements where applicable

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 is mandatory for in-scope LED room luminaires. Products must be registered (with CQC / the China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL, which shows an absolute lm/W-based grade. The CEL is a compulsory pre-market labelling and registration scheme — structurally closer to the EU model than Azerbaijan's programme-driven approach, but there is no mutual recognition with any Azerbaijan scheme.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255 对范围内 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附 CEL 前注册（向 CQC / 中国节能产品认证），CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 显示等级。CEL 为强制性上市前标签及注册方案——结构上较阿塞拜疆以计划驱动的做法更接近欧盟模式，但与阿塞拜疆任何方案均无互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255 對範圍內 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附 CEL 前注冊（向 CQC / 中國節能產品認證），CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 顯示等級。CEL 為強制性上市前標籤及注冊方案——結構上較亞塞拜然以計劃驅動的做法更接近歐盟模式，但與亞塞拜然任何方案均無互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — registration with CQC / China Energy Conservation Programme

gap.en: Unlike the EU lane, Azerbaijan has no confirmed EU-EPREL-equivalent pre-market product database registration and no confirmed pan-market A-G label obligation for light sources, so the heavy EU labelling/registration burden does not automatically transfer. Versus the CN baseline: (1) the China Energy Label and CQC/CECP registration do not transfer to Azerbaijan and should be removed or adapted from Azerbaijan-market packaging; (2) where a national Azerbaijan energy-information scheme applies, provide rated efficacy/electrical data through the in-country importer in the prescribed format and language (Azerbaijani, often also Russian); (3) confirm whether any registration is required under the national scheme. Net effect: the documentation/labelling burden for energy information in Azerbaijan is generally lighter than the EU, but the exact current national scheme must be verified before market placement.
gap.zh: 与欧盟通道不同，阿塞拜疆未确认存在相当于欧盟 EPREL 的上市前产品数据库注册，亦未确认对光源有全市场 A-G 标签义务，故欧盟繁重的标签/注册负担不自动转用。相对中国基线：（1）中国能效标识及 CQC/CECP 注册不转用至阿塞拜疆，应自阿塞拜疆市场包装移除或调整；（2）在阿塞拜疆国家能效信息方案适用时，经在地进口商按规定版式及语言（阿塞拜疆语，常加俄语）提供额定光效/电气数据；（3）确认国家方案下是否须注册。净效果：阿塞拜疆能效信息的文件/标签负担一般轻于欧盟，但上市前须核实确切的现行国家方案。
gap.zht: 與歐盟通道不同，亞塞拜然未確認存在相當於歐盟 EPREL 的上市前產品數據庫注冊，亦未確認對光源有全市場 A-G 標籤義務，故歐盟繁重的標籤/注冊負擔不自動轉用。相對中國基線：（1）中國能效標識及 CQC/CECP 注冊不轉用至亞塞拜然，應自亞塞拜然市場包裝移除或調整；（2）在亞塞拜然國家能效信息方案適用時，經在地進口商按規定版式及語言（亞塞拜然語，常加俄語）提供額定光效/電氣數據；（3）確認國家方案下是否須注冊。淨效果：亞塞拜然能效信息的文件/標籤負擔一般輕於歐盟，但上市前須核實確切的現行國家方案。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no confirmed EU-EPREL-equivalent database registration or pan-market A-G label for light sources; energy information handled via national programmes / AZSTAND consumer-information rules (confirm current scheme and any registration)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Azerbaijan has no confirmed EU-EPREL-equivalent pre-market database registration or pan-market A-G energy label for light sources; energy information is handled through national programmes and any applicable AZSTAND consumer-information rules. The China Energy Label and CQC/CECP registration do not transfer and should be removed or adapted for Azerbaijan-market packaging. Where a national energy-information scheme applies, provide rated efficacy/electrical data via the in-country importer in the prescribed format and language. Verify the current national scheme and any registration requirement before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆未确认存在相当于欧盟 EPREL 的上市前数据库注册，亦无针对光源的全市场 A-G 能效标签；能效信息通过国家计划及任何适用的 AZSTAND 消费者信息规则处理。中国能效标识及 CQC/CECP 注册不转用，应为阿塞拜疆市场包装移除或调整。在国家能效信息方案适用时，经在地进口商按规定版式及语言提供额定光效/电气数据。上市前请核实现行国家方案及任何注册要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜然未確認存在相當於歐盟 EPREL 的上市前數據庫注冊，亦無針對光源的全市場 A-G 能效標籤；能效信息通過國家計劃及任何適用的 AZSTAND 消費者信息規則處理。中國能效標識及 CQC/CECP 注冊不轉用，應為亞塞拜然市場包裝移除或調整。在國家能效信息方案適用時，經在地進口商按規定版式及語言提供額定光效/電氣數據。上市前請核實現行國家方案及任何注冊要求。
